commands.name: commands
commands.title: rosync commands
commands.description: Prints generated command docs as JSON, either as a compact LLM index, one command entry, or the full registry.
notes: This is the LLM-facing replacement for scraping `--help` text.
Prefer `--compact` for choosing commands. Prefer `rosync commands <name>` for exact usage.
Plain `rosync commands` prints the full registry and should be reserved for explicit full-doc requests.
The output is embedded from `docs/client-commands.generated.json`, which is rebuilt from `docs/commands/*.json`.

commands.name: context
commands.title: rosync context
commands.description: Prints a compact LLM-oriented project context snapshot as JSON.
notes: Does not mutate disk or Studio.
Includes project config, synced services, tree summary, key generated files, daemon status, daemon project mismatch warnings, conflict count, and command registry pointers.
Includes LLM command-use policy so agents know to use `rosync commands --compact` and `rosync commands <name>` instead of dumping the full registry.
Use `--full-commands` only when the caller needs the complete embedded command registry in the same response.

commands.name: plan
commands.title: rosync plan
commands.description: Builds a read-only JSON plan for a mutating command without executing it.
commands.usage:
rosync plan set --path <studio-path> --prop <property> --value <json>
rosync plan new --path <parent-path> --class <ClassName> [--name <Name>] [--props <json-object>]
rosync plan rm --path <studio-path>
rosync plan mv --from <studio-path> --to <parent-path> [--force]
rosync plan resolve --path <filesystem-path> (--disk | --studio)
examples: rosync plan new --path ReplicatedStorage --class Folder --name Shared
notes: Does not mutate disk or Studio.
Returns `mutates`, `requires`, `risks`, and an `executeCommand` string.
Use this before running risky write commands from an LLM workflow.

commands.name: query
commands.title: rosync query
commands.description: Matches a selector against the project `tree.json` skeleton without needing the daemon or Studio.
notes: `*` matches one path segment and `**` matches zero or more segments.
Use this first when you only need to discover what exists in the latest Studio tree.

commands.name: path
commands.title: rosync path
commands.description: Translates between Studio instance paths and syncable filesystem paths using `tree.json`.
notes: Studio-authoritative classes are reported clearly instead of pretending they map to files.
Generated files such as `tree.json` and `ro-sync.md` are not syncable Studio instances.

commands.name: lint
commands.title: rosync lint
commands.description: Runs `luau-lsp analyze` against a project or one or more paths with a Ro Sync sourcemap, Roblox definitions, and dependency-aware diagnostic filtering.
notes: If `--luau-lsp` is omitted, Ro Sync checks `ROSYNC_LUAU_LSP` and then `PATH`.
Bundled Roblox definitions are used automatically when present under `tools/luau-lsp/roblox/`.

Default vendor ignores hide diagnostics under common dependency/tooling folders such as `Packages`, `_Index`, `Madwork*`, `PlayerModule`, `node_modules`, `tools`, `.codex`, and `.vscode`; pass `--no-vendor-ignores` to disable them.
`--scope-only` / `--owned-only` requires at least one `--path` and filters captured diagnostics down to those requested paths while preserving non-diagnostic luau-lsp log lines.

commands.name: upload
commands.title: rosync upload
commands.description: Uploads Roblox assets through Open Cloud from files or directories.
notes: Reads credentials from `ROBLOX_API_KEY`, a custom `--api-key-env`, or the widget Secrets store.
Directories recurse by default, skip unsupported files, and continue after per-file failures.
Use `--auth bearer` for OAuth tokens instead of API keys.

commands.name: monetization
commands.title: rosync monetization
commands.description: Discovers, lists, creates, edits, and uploads images for Roblox game passes and developer products through Open Cloud.
commands.usage:
rosync monetization gamepass discover [--project <path>]
rosync monetization gamepass list [--project <path>] [--universe-id <id>] [--api-key-env <name>] [--raw]
rosync monetization gamepass create [--project <path>] [--universe-id <id>] [--api-key-env <name>] [--description <text>] [--image <file>] [--not-for-sale] (<entry>... | --name <name> --price <robux>)
rosync monetization gamepass edit [--project <path>] [--universe-id <id>] [--api-key-env <name>] (--id <id> | --name <existing-name>) [--new-name <name>] [--price <robux>] [--description <text>] [--for-sale true|false]
rosync monetization gamepass image [--project <path>] [--universe-id <id>] [--api-key-env <name>] (--id <id> | --name <existing-name>) <file>
rosync monetization gamepass images [--project <path>] [--universe-id <id>] [--api-key-env <name>] <dir>
# Replace gamepass with product, dp, devproduct, gp, pass, or gamepasses as needed.
examples: rosync monetization product create "Coins Small 49 robux, Coins Large 399 robux" --project .
notes: Uses multipart/form-data and Roblox Open Cloud API keys.
Credential discovery checks ROBLOX_API_KEY, CLOUD_API_KEY, ROBLOX_OPEN_CLOUD_API_KEY, project env files, then the Ro Sync widget Secrets store.
Universe discovery checks --universe-id, ROBLOX_UNIVERSE_ID, UNIVERSE_ID, GAMEID, GAME_ID, project env files, then ro-sync.json gameId.
discover reports likely monetization config files but does not guess project-specific code writes when schema is ambiguous.
images matches files to assets by normalized filename, such as coins-small.png to Coins Small.

commands.name: get
commands.title: rosync get
commands.description: Reads an instance view or one property from the live Studio session.
notes: Requires the daemon and Studio plugin to be connected.
Works across the whole DataModel, not only filesystem-synced classes.

commands.name: ls
commands.title: rosync ls
commands.description: Lists the direct children of a live Studio instance.
notes: An empty path lists top-level DataModel services.
Use `tree` when you need recursive output.

commands.name: tree
commands.title: rosync tree
commands.description: Prints a class and name tree below a live Studio instance.
notes: Depth defaults to 3; use 0 for only the root instance.

commands.name: snapshot
commands.title: rosync snapshot
commands.description: Exports the live Studio tree plus inspectable properties, attributes, and tags to deterministic JSON.
notes: Defaults to `rosync-snapshot-<unix-seconds>.json` under the project or current directory.
Useful for backups, debugging, and comparing Studio state outside the sync surface.

commands.name: diff
commands.title: rosync diff
commands.description: Compares local scripts and folders against the live Studio syncable tree.
notes: Reports items added locally, removed locally, and scripts whose `Source` differs.

commands.name: changes
commands.title: rosync changes
commands.description: Alias for `rosync diff`, intended for reviewing what a resync would change.
notes: Only compares synced services, so random project files are ignored.

commands.name: services
commands.title: rosync services
commands.description: Lists Ro Sync service roots and whether each exists on disk and in live Studio.
notes: Uses the fixed synced service allowlist rather than scanning arbitrary top-level folders.

commands.name: meta
commands.title: rosync meta
commands.description: Shows the Studio path, class, filesystem path, and existence status for a syncable path.
notes: Requires `tree.json`, so connect Studio once before using it on new projects.

commands.name: props
commands.title: rosync props
commands.description: Prints inspectable live Studio properties for one instance.
notes: This is a focused view over `rosync get --path <path>`.

commands.name: source
commands.title: rosync source
commands.description: Prints script source from live Studio or from the synced disk file.
notes: Without `--disk`, reads the live Studio `Source` property through the plugin.

commands.name: where
commands.title: rosync where
commands.description: Finds live Studio instances by name substring and, when possible, resolves a target path to disk.
notes: Combines a live name search with local path translation when `--project` is supplied.

commands.name: open
commands.title: rosync open
commands.description: Selects one or more Studio instances by path.
notes: This is a shorthand over `rosync select set --paths '[...]'`.

commands.name: conflicts
commands.title: rosync conflicts
commands.description: Lists parked source conflicts waiting for a Keep Disk or Keep Studio decision.
notes: Only source conflicts parked by the daemon conflict engine are shown.

commands.name: resolve
commands.title: rosync resolve
commands.description: Resolves one parked conflict by keeping either disk or Studio content.
notes: `--studio` writes Studio bytes to disk; `--disk` pushes disk bytes back to Studio.

commands.name: tail
commands.title: rosync tail
commands.description: Streams Studio output, warning, and error messages until interrupted.
notes: Equivalent to `rosync logs --tail`.

commands.name: watch
commands.title: rosync watch
commands.description: Streams raw daemon WebSocket frames for debugging sync traffic.
notes: Use this for debugging daemon/plugin traffic; `rosync tail` is better for Studio output.

commands.name: repair
commands.title: rosync repair
commands.description: Rebuilds generated Ro Sync metadata.
commands.usage:
rosync repair tree [--project <path>] [--port <port>] [--depth <n>] [--raw]
rosync repair sourcemap [--project <path>] [--output <path>] [--raw]
notes: `repair tree` refreshes `tree.json` from live Studio.
`repair sourcemap` rebuilds luau-lsp sourcemap JSON from synced service folders.

commands.name: find
commands.title: rosync find
commands.description: Finds live Studio instances by class name and/or name substring.
notes: Omit `--under` to search the whole DataModel.

commands.name: find-attr
commands.title: rosync find-attr
commands.description: Finds live Studio instances that have a named attribute, optionally matching a value.
notes: `--value` uses the same JSON literal and tagged-value codec as `rosync set --value`.

commands.name: classinfo
commands.title: rosync classinfo
commands.description: Lists properties and methods for a Roblox class using Studio reflection when available.
notes: Falls back to a baked table for common classes when reflection is unavailable.

commands.name: enums
commands.title: rosync enums
commands.description: Lists every Enum type name exposed by the connected Studio session.
notes: Use `rosync enum --name <EnumName>` to inspect one enum's items.

commands.name: enum
commands.title: rosync enum
commands.description: Lists the items for one Roblox Enum type.
notes: Outputs item names and underlying integer values.

commands.name: logs
commands.title: rosync logs
commands.description: Reads recent Studio output, warning, and error messages from the plugin log buffer.
notes: `--tail` streams until interrupted.

commands.name: status
commands.title: rosync status
commands.description: Summarizes daemon reachability, plugin handshake, project config, `tree.json`, sourcemap, and write-log health.
notes: Useful as the first live check before making further CLI calls.

commands.name: doctor
commands.title: rosync doctor
commands.description: Runs a broader health check over project files, daemon, plugin, linter, and sourcemap setup.
notes: Use after `status` when setup or connectivity looks suspicious.

commands.name: ping
commands.title: rosync ping
commands.description: Round-trips a lightweight request to the Studio plugin and reports latency.
notes: A fast way to confirm the plugin WebSocket path is alive.

commands.name: version
commands.title: rosync version
commands.description: Prints the daemon build version and, when reachable, the plugin version.
notes: Useful when checking for mismatched widget, daemon, or plugin installs.

commands.name: refresh
commands.title: rosync refresh
commands.description: Refreshes generated Ro Sync agent docs without starting the daemon.
notes: Updates `ro-sync.md`, `AGENTS.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, and `.codex/config.toml` while preserving project notes outside generated blocks.
When Wally is enabled or a `wally.toml` is present, the regenerated `AGENTS.md` block embeds the resolved Wally settings and package config.

commands.name: set
commands.title: rosync set
commands.description: Sets one property or applies a batch of property writes in the live Studio session.
notes: Every successful write is appended to `writes.log`.
`set Parent` is refused by default; use `rosync mv`, or pass `--force-parent` only when raw parent assignment is intentional.
`--waypoint` brackets the write so one Studio undo can reverse the batch.

commands.name: new
commands.title: rosync new
commands.description: Creates a new live Studio instance under a parent path.
notes: `--props` uses the same value codec as `rosync set --value`.
The created instance is written to `writes.log`.

commands.name: rm
commands.title: rosync rm
commands.description: Destroys a live Studio instance.
notes: Calls `:Destroy()` through the plugin and records the write in `writes.log`.

commands.name: mv
commands.title: rosync mv
commands.description: Reparents a live Studio instance to a destination parent path.
notes: Cross-service moves require `--force` to catch accidental DataModel reshuffles.
Use this instead of `rosync set --prop Parent`.

commands.name: attr
commands.title: rosync attr
commands.description: Lists, sets, or removes attributes on a live Studio instance.
notes: `attr ls` is read-only; `attr set` and `attr rm` are written to `writes.log`.
`--value` uses the same JSON literal and tagged-value codec as `rosync set --value`.

commands.name: tag
commands.title: rosync tag
commands.description: Adds or removes CollectionService tags on a live Studio instance.
notes: Successful tag mutations are written to `writes.log`.

commands.name: call
commands.title: rosync call
commands.description: Invokes a method on a live Studio instance and prints the returned value.
notes: `--args` is a JSON array using the same tagged-value codec as `rosync set --value`.
Treat methods with side effects as writes; successful calls are audited.

commands.name: select
commands.title: rosync select
commands.description: Reads or replaces the current Studio Selection.
notes: `select get` is read-only; `select set` is a Studio state change.

commands.name: eval
commands.title: rosync eval
commands.description: Executes Luau source inside Studio through the plugin sandbox.
notes: Use `return ...` when you need a returned value.
This is the broadest escape hatch; ask before using it for mutations.

commands.name: save
commands.title: rosync save
commands.description: Asks Studio to save the current place.
notes: The CLI returns after Studio accepts the save request; the actual save is asynchronous.

commands.name: transmit
commands.title: rosync transmit
commands.description: Runs an optional Studio render script, reads EditableImage/ImageLabel/ImageButton/MeshPart texture pixels from Studio, and writes local PNG files for editing or upload.
examples: rosync transmit --project . --source 'local Photobooth = require(game.ServerStorage.Photobooth.Bindings); return Photobooth.captureViewport({rect = Rect.new(0, 0, 300, 300), type = "NoSkybox"})' --output renders
notes: The plugin accepts EditableImage objects directly and can also read ImageLabel/ImageButton content through AssetService.

Photobooth captures may return MeshParts with object-backed TextureContent. Ro Sync reads Content.Object directly when it is already an EditableImage, otherwise it falls back to CreateEditableImageAsync for TextureContent or TextureID.

--source and --source-file execute with loadstring in the plugin's real Studio environment, so normal globals like game, workspace, require, Rect, Vector2, and Photobooth bindings are available without a custom sandbox.
Large batches are prepared once, then downloaded one image per request so full 768x768 render sets do not have to fit in one WebSocket response.
If --source or --source-file returns images, those are captured. If --from is supplied, Ro Sync also walks that Studio subtree after the source runs and captures any image-like instances found there.
The command writes PNG files locally. Use `rosync upload` afterwards when you want to publish the edited images to Roblox Open Cloud.
This executes Luau in Studio, so treat it like `rosync eval`: inspect render scripts first and avoid destructive code.

commands.name: waypoint
commands.title: rosync waypoint
commands.description: Creates a named Studio change-history waypoint.
notes: Use waypoints before and after multi-step edits so Studio undo has a clear boundary.

commands.name: undo
commands.title: rosync undo
commands.description: Requests Studio to undo one change-history entry.
notes: Pairs naturally with `--waypoint` on `rosync set` for reversible batches.

commands.name: redo
commands.title: rosync redo
commands.description: Requests Studio to redo the last undone change-history entry.
notes: Requires the same live Studio/plugin connection as `undo`.

commands.name: serve
commands.title: rosync serve
commands.description: Runs the local HTTP/WebSocket daemon that bridges the widget, Studio plugin, filesystem watcher, and CLI.
notes: The widget normally launches this for the active project.
Use it manually when debugging daemon/plugin connectivity outside the widget.
